item.title: TheCraigHewitt /seomachine
item.description: A specialized Claude Code workspace for creating long-form, SEO-optimized blog content for any business. This system helps you research, write, analyze, and optimize content that ranks well and serves your target audience.

item.title: elebumm /RedditVideoMakerBot
item.description: Create Reddit Videos with just✨ one command ✨

item.title: tobi /qmd
item.description: mini cli search engine for your docs, knowledge bases, meeting notes, whatever. Tracking current sota approaches while being all local

item.title: abhigyanpatwari /GitNexus
item.description: GitNexus: The Zero-Server Code Intelligence Engine - GitNexus is a client-side knowledge graph creator that runs entirely in your browser. Drop in a GitHub repo or ZIP file, and get an interactive knowledge graph wit a built in Graph RAG Agent. Perfect for code exploration

item.title: google-ai-edge /gallery
item.description: A gallery that showcases on-device ML/GenAI use cases and allows people to try and use models locally.
